objects.content:
Automated investigation by inframap v1.4.0.
Seed: onmicrosoft.co
Confidence: 95/100 (CONFIRMED)
Sources used: crt.sh, RDAP, urlscan.io, BGP.he.net, AbuseIPDB, Shodan InternetDB, VirusTotal
Generated: 2026-04-08T10:54:43Z

Key findings:
- [CONFIRMED] crt.sh: 1 cert cluster(s) with rapid issuance (≥3 certs/month)
- [ANALYST ASSESSMENT] crt.sh: 1 wildcard SAN entries detected
- [CONFIRMED] crt.sh: fast-spin detected: ≥5 certs issued in one month (rapid infra standup)
- [CONFIRMED] urlscan.io: 106 existing scan(s) found on urlscan.io
- [ANALYST ASSESSMENT] Shodan InternetDB: 104.18.28.29: 13 open ports (80, 443, 2052, 2053, 2082)
- [ANALYST ASSESSMENT] Shodan InternetDB: 172.67.68.172: 12 open ports (80, 443, 2052, 2082, 2083)
- [ANALYST ASSESSMENT] Shodan InternetDB: 208.91.196.145: 3 open ports (53, 80, 443)
- [CONFIRMED] VirusTotal: VirusTotal: 12/94 vendors flag as malicious — verdict: MALICIOUS
- [ANALYST ASSESSMENT] VirusTotal: VirusTotal categories: phishing and fraud, web infrastructure
